# Surf Rental Aljezur

> Surfboard and wetsuit rental with free delivery to your accommodation in Aljezur, Arrifana, Vale da Telha, and Monte Clérigo on the Costa Vicentina, Portugal.

## About

Surf Rental is a surf gear rental service based in the Aljezur area of Portugal's Costa Vicentina. We deliver surfboards and wetsuits directly to holiday accommodations (Airbnbs, villas, holiday homes) and pick them up before checkout.

## Key Facts

- Delivery area: Aljezur, Arrifana, Vale da Telha, Monte Clérigo
- Free delivery and pickup included in all packages
- No real-time booking — inquiries via email, WhatsApp, or contact form
- Confirmation within 24 hours

## Pricing (2026)

### Daily Rates (3-day minimum)

- Board Only: €25/day (surfboard, leash, wax)
- Full Package: €35/day (surfboard, wetsuit, leash, wax)
- Premium Package: €45/day (surfboard, wetsuit, changing mat, roof rack pads, leash, wax)

### Weekly Rates

- Board Only: €85/week (surfboard, leash, wax)
- Full Package: €120/week (surfboard, wetsuit, leash, wax)
- Premium Package: €150/week (surfboard, wetsuit, changing mat, roof rack pads, leash, wax)

### Extended Stay (2 Weeks)

- Board Only: €145/2 weeks
- Full Package: €199/2 weeks (includes mid-stay board swap)
- Premium Package: €249/2 weeks (includes mid-stay board swap)

### Group Discounts

- 3–5 people: ~12% off per person
- 6+ people: custom quote

## Equipment

### Surfboards
- 7'0 and 7'8 Funboards (soft top): beginners to intermediate
- 8'6 Longboard (soft top): beginners and longboarders
- 6'6 Shortboard (soft top): advanced

### Wetsuits
- Summer (Jun–Sep): 3/2mm
- Shoulder season (Apr–May, Oct): 4/3mm
- Winter (Nov–Mar): 4/3mm or 5/3mm

### Premium Extras
- Changing tub: portable tub for changing out of wetsuit at the beach
- Roof rack pads: soft pads with straps to safely transport boards on any rental car

## Surf Spots Served

### Praia da Arrifana
- Level: All levels
- Best for: Sheltered bay with multiple peaks. Beginners in the middle, intermediates on the outside, advanced surfers at the point break (Canal/Kangaroos) on bigger swells.

### Monte Clérigo
- Level: Beginner to intermediate
- Best for: Forgiving beach break with crumbly waves. Good for building confidence.

### Amoreira
- Level: Intermediate to advanced
- Best for: Powerful river-mouth beach break. Strong currents — requires experience.

### Vale Figueiras
- Level: Intermediate to advanced
- Best for: Exposed, uncrowded beach break. Consistent swell, multiple peaks.
